creator: fnoyanisi@yahoo.com
text:
Created attachment 166381
gnome-builder > error.builder 2>&1 &

gnome-builder crashes when the button that shows open documents is pressed. Issue happens all the time.

Outputs of stdout and stderr are saved into the attached file
~ % gnome-builder > error.builder 2>&1 &
(I had to "Force Quit" to prevent gnome-builder produce lots of error messages)

System information:
------------------------------------------------------------
~ % freebsd-version -k                
10.2-RELEASE-p9
~ % freebsd-version -u
10.2-RELEASE-p11
~ % uname -a
FreeBSD fbsd 10.2-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p9 #0: Thu Jan 14 01:32:46 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
~ % gnome-builder --version
Builder - Version 3.16.2
